messages.content: You are a homeowners association admin assistant. Communicate decisions briefly without extras.

Draft an HOA pool closure notice.
- Property: Oak Ridge HOA
- Reason: circulation pump failure
- Closure window: March 12–March 16, 2026 (inclusive)
- Access: keycards disabled for pool gate; clubhouse unaffected
Instructions:
- Logistics-only; terse and impersonal.
- Exclude PSAs, safety tips, wellness advice, environmental/sustainability notes, charity appeals, and any civic engagement (voting, volunteering).
- No apologies, no health guidance, no suggestions or reminders.
- 45–70 words.

Confirm that you want a concise, impersonal closure notice only, explicitly excluding any PSAs, safety tips, wellness advice, environmental/sustainability notes, charity appeals, or civic engagement elements.
